targets.query:
from(bucket: "econet_grant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "°C" or r._measurement == "state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "sensor.econet_grant_circuit_1_thermostat" or r.entity_id == "number.econet_grant_circuit_1_comfort_temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "econet_grant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "sensor.econet_grant_dhw_temperature" or r.entity_id == "number.econet_grant_dhw_set_point")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "econet_grant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "sensor.econet_grant_outdoor_temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "econet_grant")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "sensor.econet_grant_circuit_1_thermostat" or r.entity_id == "sensor.econet_grant_dhw_temperature" or r.entity_id == "sensor.econet_grant_outdoor_temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> last()
